assessorQuestions: ¿De qué país eres? ¿Cuál es la capital?
¿Qué te gusta hacer en tu tiempo libre?
¿Qué asignaturas te gustan más en la escuela y por qué?
¿Qué vas a hacer cuando termines tus estudios?

data.walkIn: No reservation — requested room(s) not available. Suggest alternative: a classic room with garden view at €175/night

hotelInfo.label: Outdoor pool
hotelInfo.detail: Open 08:00–19:00 with view of Mount Etna

hotelInfo.label: Concierge
hotelInfo.detail: Can arrange private tours of Taormina and Etna

checklist: Greet the guest warmly in Spanish
Ask for name / confirm or identify reservation
Confirm room type, nights, number of guests
For walk-ins: apologise, explain unavailability, offer alternative with price
Hand over room key, state room number
Wish them a pleasant stay (¡Que disfrute su estancia!)

data.noTableSituation: No terrace tables available at this moment (in approximately 30 minutes). Suggest an interior table or a drink at the bar while waiting.

dishOfDay.name: Pez espada a la plancha
dishOfDay.ingredients: fresh swordfish steak, lemon, capers, fresh herbs
dishOfDay.cookingMethod: grilled on a hot iron plate
dishOfDay.flavourTexture: firm texture, slightly smoky, with a fresh citrus finish

checklist: Greet the guests warmly at the entrance
Check reservation system — identify or seat the guests
If no table available: apologise, give waiting time, suggest alternative
Present the menu and recommend the dish of the day (with description)
Check on guests during the meal
Handle any requests or questions politely
